content: Define the module TopModule with the specified inputs and outputs. The inputs should include a 256-bit vector 'in' and an 8-bit selector 'sel'. The output should be a single bit 'out'.
source:
input  in  (256 bits)
input  sel (  8 bits)
output out

content: Implement the 256-to-1 multiplexer logic using a case statement that selects the output based on the 'sel' input. Each case within the statement corresponds to one bit of the 'in' vector being assigned to 'out' based on the value of 'sel'.
source: sel=0 should select in[0], sel=1 selects bits in[1], sel=2 selects bits in[2], etc.
